# OctoAcme — Project Kickoff Checklist

Use this checklist at the start of every new project to ensure alignment before moving into Planning.

See also: [Project Initiation Guide](../octoacme-project-initiation.md) | [Roles & Personas](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md)

---

## Pre-Kickoff (Project Manager)

- [ ] Project One-pager drafted and reviewed by Product Manager
- [ ] Sponsor / stakeholder list confirmed
- [ ] Go / no-go decision recorded
- [ ] Kickoff meeting time scheduled and invites sent (all required roles)
- [ ] Draft agenda shared at least 24 hours in advance

---

## Kickoff Meeting Agenda

**Suggested timebox: 60 minutes**

| # | Topic | Owner | Time |
|---|-------|-------|------|
| 1 | Welcome & introductions | Project Manager | 5 min |
| 2 | Problem statement & goals | Product Manager | 10 min |
| 3 | Success metrics & Definition of Done | Product Manager | 10 min |
| 4 | Scope, non-scope, and known constraints | Project Manager | 10 min |
| 5 | Roles & responsibilities overview | Project Manager | 10 min |
| 6 | High-level timeline & milestones | Project Manager | 5 min |
| 7 | Open questions & risks | All | 5 min |
| 8 | Next steps & action items | Project Manager | 5 min |

---

## Post-Kickoff Actions (within 48 hours)

- [ ] Meeting notes and decisions published to the project repo
- [ ] Action items logged with owners and due dates
- [ ] Project board created or updated with initial backlog items
- [ ] Risk register started with initial risks identified in kickoff
- [ ] Documentation plan confirmed with Technical Writer (if applicable)
- [ ] CI/CD environment readiness confirmed with DevOps Engineer

---

## Role-Specific Readiness Checks

| Role | Readiness Check |
|------|----------------|
| **Product Manager** | Backlog seeded with epics or user stories; acceptance criteria drafted for Sprint 1 |
| **Developers** | Dev environment set up; branching strategy agreed |
| **UI/UX Designer** | Design brief or discovery plan in place |
| **DevOps Engineer** | Pipeline and environments provisioned or scheduled |
| **Technical Writer** | Documentation deliverables identified and added to milestone |
| **Data Analyst** | Baseline metrics and instrumentation plan defined |
| **Customer Support Lead** | Support readiness criteria noted for release planning |

---
